entry.title: Agent chat history in .NET Microsoft Agent Framework with SQL Server, Ollama and Docker Desktop

media:group.media:title: Agent chat history in .NET Microsoft Agent Framework with SQL Server, Ollama and Docker Desktop
media:group.media:description: Authorised Territory code examples - This #ai #dotnet #tutorial demonstrates how AI agent created in .NET Microsoft Agent Framework can store chat messages in SQL Server 2025 table. The chat history is then retrieved and used in a new conversation to influence the agent response. The tutorial uses Ollama running locally with gpt-oss as LLM for chat and nomic-embed-text LLM for embeddings generation. SQL Server 2025 runs in Docker Desktop
